title: MeterDataRequestCredential
description: W3C Verifiable Credential (VC Data Model 2.0) wrapping a MeterDataRequest. Subclass of EnergyCredential (https://schema.beckn.io/EnergyCredential/v2.0). The common VC envelope (issuer with licenseNumber, validFrom/validUntil, credentialStatus, proof) is inherited from EnergyCredential. This schema adds the IES-specific credentialSubject containing a MeterDataRequest.

meterDataRequest.description: The scoped, time-bounded data request payload.
